decision_summary.final_decision: HOLD: do not release escalation under packet rules

task: Rebuild decision logic and produce a review-ready dose escalation decision package using only the embedded packet. Identify threshold crossings per the provided score formula, test sensitivity (including 5% shifts), and produce row-level calculations and citations. Deliver a reproducible spreadsheet (dose_escalation_decision.xlsx) containing formulas/executable logic and a safety committee memo (safety_committee_memo.md) with assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final decision table. Do not use external data; mark any unresolved ambiguity as needs_review.
